Identity.Name: StingRevisionTypes
Identity.Definition: Revision prefix codes per ISO 19650-2 / BS 1192 conventions — P for Preliminary (S0..S4 suitability), C for Construction (A1..A5), B for Built / as-built, R for revision-of-revision (post-handover changes). Used as the first character of a revision identifier — e.g. P01 (first preliminary issue), C03 (third construction issue), B01 (first as-built).

Value.Definition: Preliminary — pre-construction issues. Combined with two-digit sequence: P01, P02, ..., P99.
Construction — issued for construction. Combined with two-digit sequence: C01, C02, ..., C99.
Built — as-built / record drawings. Combined with two-digit sequence: B01, B02, ..., B99.
Revision — post-handover changes to AIM. Combined with two-digit sequence: R01, R02, ..., R99.
Unknown / not yet assigned. Should never appear in a published revision identifier.
